inputs.titre: Carl von Linné formalise la nomenclature binomiale pour classer les espèces végétales

reason: The image depicts a scene that reasonably represents Carl von Linné formalizing the binomial nomenclature in 1753. The clothing, writing tools, desk, and candle lighting are all consistent with the era. The absence of anachronisms and fantastical elements further supports its validity. The overall atmosphere evokes a sense of intellectual endeavor and aligns with the historical context. Some aspects could be improved regarding the lighting and text in the book.
